message:
🛡️ Add pre-merge Go test gate + consolidate release-failure issues (#8354)

Two changes to break the nightly-release-breakage cycle we've been in
since 4/13 (one auto-opened issue per night, one AI fix per day, next
night still broken).

### 1. Pre-merge Go test gate (new go-test.yml)

Root cause of the cycle: PR-level CI never ran `go test ./...`. The
only invocation of the full Go test suite lived in release.yml, which
runs overnight. So Go breakages could land on main silently during the
day and only surface the next morning as a release failure.

New workflow runs `go test -race -timeout 10m ./...` on every PR that
touches Go code (and on push to main as a safety net). Cancels stale
runs via concurrency group. Locally the full suite with -race completes
in ~2.5 min; 15 min timeout for headroom.

### 2. Rolling-incident issue consolidation (release.yml notify job)

Previously the notify job called `issues.create()` unconditionally on
every failure, so each failed night cut a fresh bug with no thread
linking it to yesterday's "fixed" one. Made the "this keeps breaking"
signal invisible.

Now: look up the most recent release-failure issue. If it's open,
append a failure comment. If it was closed within the last 48h, reopen
it with a "previous fix did not stick" note and append the comment.
Otherwise create a new issue. One rolling thread per incident instead
of a fresh issue each night.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+name: Go Tests
+
+# Pre-merge gate that runs the FULL Go test suite on PRs. Without this,
+# Go test breakages would only surface in the nightly Release workflow —
+# historically every test failure in the nightly had to be traced back
+# to an already-merged commit. See release.yml for the other invocation.
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    paths:
+      - '**.go'
+      - 'go.mod'
+      - 'go.sum'
+      - '.github/workflows/go-test.yml'
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - '**.go'
+      - 'go.mod'
+      - 'go.sum'
+      - '.github/workflows/go-test.yml'
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+# Cancel superseded runs on the same PR/branch so we don't queue stale work.
+concurrency:
+  group: go-test-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    name: go test ./...
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    # Matches the release workflow's timeout budget; full suite runs in
+    # ~1-2 minutes today, cushion is for slower runners and test growth.
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
+
+      - name: Set up Go
+        uses: actions/setup-go@3041bf56c941b39c61721a86cd11f3bb1338122a # v5.2.0
+        with:
+          go-version: '1.25'
+          cache: true
+
+      # Full suite — must match what release.yml runs or main can still
+      # break the nightly. -race catches concurrency bugs that only show
+      # up under load, which is cheap relative to the cost of a broken
+      # release pipeline.
+      - name: Run full Go test suite
+        run: go test -race -timeout 10m ./...
